trade.summary: Significant bilateral trade relationship. The UK exports machinery, vehicles, and financial services to Poland. Poland exports furniture, machinery, and agri-food to the UK. The large Polish community in the UK (~1 million people) creates substantial remittance and services trade flows. Post-Brexit, some trade shifted but overall volumes remain robust.
disputes: post-Brexit settlement rights for Polish citizens in UK

diplomatic.summary: The UK and Poland have developed one of the closest bilateral relationships in Europe. Both are strongly committed to Ukraine's defence. Poland's massive defence buildup aligns with UK security priorities. The UK-Poland Enhanced Defence and Security Cooperation Agreement (2023) elevated the partnership. Large Polish diaspora in UK creates people-to-people ties.
recent_incidents: Polish citizens' Brexit settlement scheme processing issues

military.summary: Very strong military relationship. Both NATO members with deeply aligned threat assessments on Russia. UK troops deployed in Poland as part of NATO enhanced forward presence. UK has supplied Ukraine with military aid coordinated with Poland. UK and Poland are co-leaders in NATO's eastern flank reinforcement. UK support for Poland's defence buildup is significant.

financial.summary: UK investment in Poland is significant across financial services, retail, and manufacturing. UK banks are active in Polish markets. Large Polish diaspora in UK creates substantial remittance flows to Poland. Polish companies have growing UK presence in construction and manufacturing.

energy.summary: UK and Poland are cooperating on energy security within NATO frameworks. UK supports Poland's nuclear energy plans. UK expertise in offshore wind relevant to Baltic Sea development. Limited direct bilateral energy trade.

scientific.summary: Strong scientific ties. Large Polish academic community in UK universities. Joint research through bilateral agreements. Polish mathematicians and physicists well-represented in UK academia. UK-Poland cooperation in AI, cybersecurity, and advanced manufacturing growing.
